summary: File manager app (v0.4.149) with styled upload/folder buttons featuring light filled backgrounds (no colored borders) and native button styling.
architectural_notes: Buttons (Upload Files, New Folder, Upload Folder) use light filled backgrounds (light blue / light yellow) with native border style — no colored outlines. Dark text/icon for contrast.
known_issues: Button background color fix (light fill, native border) has been repeatedly requested but not yet successfully applied as of v0.4.148.

existing_features.title: In FileList.tsx, update the 'Upload Files' button so it has a light blue filled background (e.g. bg-blue-100 in light mode / bg-blue-900/30 in dark mode), uses the native/default button border (no custom border color or outline color — remove any blue border/ring/outline classes), and has dark text and icon for contrast.

In FileList.tsx, update the 'New Folder' and 'Upload Folder' buttons so they have a light yellow filled background (e.g. bg-yellow-100 in light mode / bg-yellow-900/30 in dark mode), use the native/default button border (no custom border color or outline color — remove any yellow border/ring/outline classes), and have dark text and icon for contrast.
Update the APP_VERSION constant in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts from '0.4.148' to '0.4.149'.
